function.name: scripts_list
function.description: List .ts/.js script files in the Gist (excludes generated entry and rules JSON). Returns filenames and byte lengths.

function.name: scripts_runtime_summary
function.description: Return runtime/preset capability summary (GM_*, GME_*, constants, and constraints). Call before generating script content.

function.name: scripts_get
function.description: Read one script file by exact Gist filename.

function.name: scripts_upsert
function.description: Create or replace a script file in the Gist.

function.name: scripts_delete
function.description: Delete a script file from the Gist.
